## Checklist

- [ ] `npm run lint` passes locally
- [ ] `npm run build` passes locally
- [ ] No unescaped entities in JSX (`'` → `&apos;`, `"` → `&quot;`)
- [ ] Context files updated (`docs/context/` — see CLAUDE.md)
- [ ] Schema changes coordinated via STATUS.md (if applicable)
- [ ] No edits to files owned by other agents (or ownership transferred in STATUS.md)
- [ ] `package-lock.json` committed if `package.json` changed
